titleStmt.title: SII 23.571: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 571. (A.R. No. 571 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the same base Rājādhirāja (II) year 12: A.D. 1175

summary.p: The date is given as Hēviḷambi, Makara. śu. 1. Saturday, Aviṭṭam corresponding to A.D. 1178, January 21.

The ends of the first two lines are lost. The inscription records the gift of 62 kuḻi of arecanut garden by one Paṭṭinaṅkiḻāṉ Dēvar to provide for the offering of tiruppōnagam to the god Kulōttuṅga[śōḻa-Viṇṇagar-Āḻvār] at Kulōttuṅgaśōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam an agara-brahmadēya of Niṟandanūr in Mēṟpākkai-nāḍu, a division of Adhirājēndra-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2- Āvatāṉa hemalambisampatsa rattu makaraṉāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamaiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattunāḷ Adhirājentra maṇṭalattu meṟpākkai nāṭṭu niṟan=ta nūr Akarabrahmadeyam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻac catuṟvetimaṅkalattuk kulottuṅka
Aṟṟaikku Oru tirupponakam sara raṇaṅkaḷakappaṭa Amutucey taruḷak kaṭavitākavum prasādam puṟkilattu śrī vakkum vaḻinaṭaiyāka cellakkaṭavitākavum Itukku Ākac ceyya veḷ marumakaṉ paṭṭiṉaṅ kiḻāṉ tevareṉ Ivvūr nampai koval(l)paṭṭar Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyeṉāy Eṉnutāyirun=ta kamukan toṭṭam pavitramā
kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭām paṭṭiyil kiḻaimukappil vaṭakkaṭaiya kālil kiḻakkaṭaiya Araikkālil vaṭakkaṭaiya kuḻi 6 10 2i Ikkuḻi Aṟupattiraṇ ṭaraiyum Ittirupponakam Oṉṟum celvatāka dharmmadānam paṇṇik kuṭuttu kuṭuttamaikku Aśeṣamahājanam sannidhiyile śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ paṭṭaṇaṅkiḻāṉ tevareṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.571 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
